# OpenClaw Operator

> Kubernetes operator for managing OpenClaw AI agent instances with production-grade security, observability, and lifecycle management.

## Docs

- [API Reference - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/api-reference/)
- [Architecture - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/architecture/)
- [Backup and Restore - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/backup-restore/)
- [Custom AI Providers - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/custom-providers/)
- [Deployment Guide - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/deployment/)
- [External Secrets Operator (ESO) Integration - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/external-secrets/)
- [Full Example - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/full-example/)
- [OpenClaw Operator - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/)
- [Model Fallback Chains - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/model-fallback/)
- [OpenClawClusterDefaults - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/openclaw-cluster-defaults/)

- [OpenClawAutoUpdateRollback - OpenClaw Operator](https://paperclip.inc/docs/operators/openclaw/latest/runbooks/OpenClawAutoUpdateRollback/)
